waypoints.instruction: Enter the main lobby of Science Building Block B.
waypoints.details: Look for the double glass doors next to the campus cafe.

waypoints.instruction: Turn left at the reception desk and head down the main hallway.
waypoints.details: Pass the lab notice board on your right.

waypoints.instruction: Go up the central spiral staircase to the 2nd Floor.
waypoints.details: Alternatively, use the elevator behind the staircase.

waypoints.instruction: Turn right and walk past the Student Research Gallery.
waypoints.details: You will see a large neon Science sign above.

waypoints.instruction: Arrive at Science Auditorium A on the left side of the gallery corridor.
waypoints.details: Double oak doors with 'Auditorium A' signage.

waypoints.instruction: Enter the Student Activity Hub via the South Entrance.
waypoints.details: The entrance with the colorful mural.

waypoints.instruction: Take the main elevator to the 2nd Floor.
waypoints.details: Elevators are directly ahead of the entrance.

waypoints.instruction: Walk straight out of the elevator and turn left.
waypoints.details: Follow the signs to the creative zone.

waypoints.instruction: Arrive at Creative Hub Room 202 on your right.
waypoints.details: Yellow door with a glass porthole window.

waypoints.instruction: Enter the Campus Stadium main gate.
waypoints.details: Present ticket at the security kiosk.

waypoints.instruction: Walk past the ticketing booths and follow the concrete path.
Enter through Gate 3 onto the athletics track.
waypoints.details: Watch out for runners on the track.

waypoints.instruction: Walk onto the Main Athletics Field (Grass pitch).
waypoints.details: The center circle is marked for kick-off.
